# L&C Food Distribution

> Asian foodservice distributor serving California restaurants since 1995. Four distribution centers (San Diego, Los Angeles, Fresno, San Jose) covering statewide delivery six days a week. 2,500+ SKUs across produce, proteins, dry grocery, disposables, and beverages. Chinese-American family-owned and operated (陈氏食品公司).

L&C Food Distribution (legal name: L&C Food Distribution, Chinese name: 陈氏食品公司) is a B2B wholesale food distributor specializing in Asian food products for foodservice operators in California. Founded in San Diego in 1995. Not a retailer — minimum order volumes apply. Serves restaurants, franchise groups, boba shops, sushi bars, and Asian food concepts.

## Key Facts

- Founded: 1995, San Diego, California
- Ownership: Chinese-American family-owned and operated
- Service territory: California statewide
- Locations: San Diego (8724 Approach Rd, 92154), Los Angeles / City of Industry (15320 Salt Lake Ave, 91745), Fresno (471 S Teilman Ave, 93706), San Jose (1309 Old Bayshore Hwy, 95112)
- SKUs: 2,500+ active catalog items
- Suppliers: 180+ including Lee Kum Kee, Kikkoman, Three Crabs, Koon Chun, Pearl River Bridge, Aroy-D, Mae Ploy, Knorr, Maggi
- Delivery: 6 days per week in verified service zones
- Cold chain: Maintained to -10 degrees Fahrenheit, farm to door
- Partner tenure: 10+ year average customer relationship
- Specialty: Off-catalog custom procurement for franchise clients

## Product Categories

- Fruits & Vegetables: Specialty Asian produce, fresh fruits, root vegetables, fungi
- Meat & Seafood: USDA-certified poultry, beef, pork, lamb, shrimp, fish, squid, sashimi-grade proteins
- Dry Grocery: Bulk rice, noodles, sauces (soy, oyster, hoisin, fish sauce), oils, seasonings, canned goods
- Disposables: Food containers, cups, lids, utensils, paper goods, cleaning supplies
- Beverages: Water, soft drinks, boba powders, tapioca pearls, specialty drinks, syrups

## Concepts Served

Boba shops, pho restaurants, Chinese kitchens, sushi bars, pan-Asian franchise groups, Asian fast-casual restaurants.

## Custom Sourcing

L&C procures off-catalog items for franchise clients to standardize their product lines. Restaurants can request specific SKUs or recipe-grade ingredients not in the standard catalog.

## Contact

- General: info@lncfood.com
- San Diego: (619) 710-2030
- Los Angeles: (626) 465-7855
- Fresno: (559) 264-0298
- San Jose: (408) 998-8211
- Hours: Monday–Friday, 8:00 AM–5:00 PM PST
